name: PreserveIsoCurveMethod
summary: The way the surface iso-lines align with the target

enum_values.name: Automatic
enum_values.summary: If the trim is on an iso direction use MatchTarget, else use Perpendicular

enum_values.name: MatchTarget
enum_values.summary: The surface tangent will be parallel to the surface derivative in U- or V-direction

enum_values.name: Perpendicular
enum_values.summary: The surface tangent will be perpendicular to the target edge

enum_values.name: Preserve
enum_values.summary: The surface tangent will not change
